examples: You don't earn trust or respect by being a pushover lapdog.
Smiling as they strode down the road, accompanied by their shih tzu lapdog, Whisky, Miss Withers wore a prominent engagement ring on her left hand.
Barofsky repeats an adage familiar to all auditors: Be a good watchdog, rather than a lapdog or a junkyard dog.
It touts the use of cameras to, in the same evening, track down the killer of a 9-year-old boy and the abuser of a small lapdog.
